prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约20762→19170→18617→15572→27204，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移趋势；2025年物理类最低位次骤降至27204名（汉语国际教育专业），较2024年理科后移约11632名，波动剧烈；该校在陕西理科/物理类招生计划：2021年6人、2022年6人、2023年7人、2024年5人、2025年7人；2026年物理类计划增至13人，较2025年大幅扩招约86%，扩招幅度显著，理论上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在124–131之间，属中游偏上211层次；该校在声誉舆情文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件；抖音热度排名第105（一般），短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度平稳，未见异常波动信号；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与经济学类、国际经济与贸易等招生专业直接关联，对文科考生吸引力较强，对理科考生影响相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类社会热度高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（电子信息科学与技术、通信工程）方向吻合，有利于相关专业报考热度；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争明显加剧；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，属东北地区；该校在陕西招生占比约0.9%（2025年50人/全国5575人），跨省招生比例较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年物理类位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招86%的缓解效应、以及陕西省物理类考生总数增长约19.7%带来的竞争加剧，三者相互对冲；扩招是主要下行压力（位次数字增大），但考生增幅同样显著，预计2026年最低位次，区间40895–41895名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 20762 → 19170 → 18617 → 15572 → 27204, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then a significant decline; in 2025, the minimum ranking for physics category plummeted to 27204 (Chinese International Education major), a drop of about 11632 places compared to 2024 science category, indicating severe volatility; the enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi science/physics category: 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 7 in 2025; in 2026, the physics category plan increases to 13, a substantial expansion of about 86% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, theoretically easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 125th, with stable rankings between 124 and 131 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive events have appeared in the university's reputation and public opinion documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 105 (average), with low short video exposure, stable application attention, and no abnormal fluctuation signals; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Economics and International Economics and Trade, which strongly attract liberal arts candidates but have relatively limited impact on science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended in society, computer majors are recommended, electrical engineering is recommended, aligning with the university's physics category enrollment majors (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering), which benefits the popularity of related majors; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9% (50 out of 5,575 nationwide in 2025), with a relatively small cross-provincial enrollment ratio, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the significant decline in physics category rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a substantial 86% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 19.7% increase in the total number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi, these factors offset each other; the expansion is the main downward pressure (ranking number increases), but the candidate increase is also significant; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be in the range of 40895–41895.
